channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: After Severino misplays a pair of comebackers, Mets in need of NLCS comeback against Dodgers
item.description: Pitcher Luis Severino twice misplayed grounders, leading to a pair of unearned runs in the second inning that put the Los Angeles Dodgers ahead for good in an 8-0 romp that gave them a 2-1 NL Championship Series lead.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants' woes continue with loss of Andrew Thomas
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Things have taken a massive downturn for the Giants. The Giants are 2 and 4 and now they have lost their franchise tackle Andrew Thomas for the season after undergoing surgery for a Lisfranc injury on his left foot.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Nick Chubb grateful, thankful as he returns to field with Browns after second major knee injury
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Almost from the moment Nick Chubb was drafted by the Cleveland Browns, he has felt a deep connection with the city and its fans. An unshakeable bond. It's never been stronger.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers' Dave Roberts still relishes 'beating that team across town'
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers manager Dave Roberts made clear on Wednesday ahead of the NLCS Game 3 that he still relishes one of the biggest moments in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Newly acquired wide receiver Davante Adams expects to play for Jets on Sunday night vs. Steelers
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Davante Adams will be Aaron Rodgers' house guest for a while, at least until the New York Jets' newly acquired wide receiver gets situated. So, they drove together to the team facility Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NWSL expansion team BOS Nation FC apologizes for 'Too Many Balls' campaign
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The National Women’s Soccer League expansion team in Boston apologized on Wednesday for a “Too Many Balls” marketing campaign that draw a harsh reaction from the transgender community and others.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes says he lets Taylor Swift bake with his daughter amid potential Trump vs. Harris divide
item.description: Patrick Mahomes said that his three-year-old daughter Sterling Sky has baked with Taylor Swift since the pop artist began dating his teammate Travis Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers Game 5: Who will advance to the NLCS?
item.description: PHOTOS: The San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers will face off in Game 5 of the National League Division Series (NLDS) on Friday, Oct. 11 at Dodger Stadium. The winner of this game will advance to the NLCS, which starts on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: 22-time Grand Slam champion Rafael Nadal will retire from tennis after next month's Davis Cup finals
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Rafael Nadal is retiring from professional tennis at age 38, he announced Thursday, after winning 22 Grand Slam titles — 14 at the French Open — during an unprecedented era he shared with rivals Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI and HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Tennis legend Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KTLA 5
